review_scope.scope: Checkpoint-3 source-first rerun focused on repairs for F001-F004 across new/user/main.cpp, new/user/run_remote_smoke.sh, and new/code/port/diagnostics.hpp, with direct validation of the requested build and wrapper commands.
notes: Reviewed the repaired source against the original checkpoint-3 motion lifecycle and harness boundary requirements.
Executed `cmake -S new/user -B new/out && cmake --build new/out -j2` successfully.

Executed `SMOKE_LOCAL_ONLY=1 SMOKE_MAX_FRAMES=5 VERIFY_LOG_PATH=/tmp/ls2k-phaseb-local-smoke.log new/user/run_remote_smoke.sh` successfully; on this host the wrapper took the documented architecture-incompatible local fallback path and exited 0 after recording that the LoongArch binary could not be executed on `x86_64`.
F001-F004 were rechecked by direct source inspection and requested command execution.
No additional materially independent issues were found within the declared repaired surface.
